rag_rules: When validator reports unresolved property references, ensure property definitions are visible in the current scope or properly imported via 'with' clauses.
If a guarantee or assumption references an invalid identifier or expression type, trace the root cause to an unresolved feature or helper declaration and fix or remove the clause.
generic_rules: Validator diagnostics pointing to unresolved identifiers should be resolved by ensuring all referenced elements are declared or imported in the current scope.
AGREE contracts must only reference visible identifiers; avoid introducing new package-qualified names not present in the model.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use only visible AADL features or helper declarations within the same annex for AGREE expressions.
Ensure all property references in AGREE annexes are resolvable by the AADL parser.
anti_patterns: Do not add new property definitions or package-qualified identifiers that are not already present in the model's configured dependencies.
Do not attempt to resolve type errors by introducing new data types or expressions outside the visible scope.
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
